# Quoin — full pattern anatomy reference

This file is the long-form anatomy reference for AI coding tools generating Quoin markup at scale. For the short index, read `/llms.txt` first.

Every pattern is documented in the same format:

1. **Identity** — pack name, version, what the pattern is for.
2. **Anatomy** — mandatory slots + conditional slots (with gating conditions).
3. **Attributes** — universal axes (apply to every variant) and variant-specific axes.
4. **States / microstates** — pattern-level states + per-element microstates.
5. **Composition** — which peer packs the pattern consumes, and via what canonical class names.
6. **ARIA contract** — landmark roles, label requirements, live regions.
7. **Minimal markup** — the smallest valid example.

Canonical specimens live at `02_reference-packs/patterns/<pack-name>/examples/`. The specimens are the source of truth: this document summarizes them, but they are byte-faithful.

---

## Universal authoring rules (apply to every pattern)

- **`data-pattern` form**: `<pattern-name>-<slot>`. Never `pattern-<name>-<slot>` (long prefix is rejected by the gate). Never `<pattern>--<slot>` (double-dash separator is rejected).
- **Content alignment**: `data-alignment="centered | left | right | split-anchor"`. Universal; replaces the legacy `data-register` attribute.
- **Sub-slot kind**: `data-kind="..."` for descriptive sub-types (e.g. overlay `data-kind="gradient-from-bottom"`, accent `data-kind="pulse"`).
- **Tokens**: every value comes from `@quoin/tokens-baseline`. Reference token names via `var(--token)`. Never hardcode color, spacing, type-size, motion, or shadow values.
- **Composition**: when consuming a peer pack, use the peer's canonical class name (`class="action-button"` for button-system). Never re-inline the peer's contract under a local class name.
- **Reduced motion**: every animated pattern must honor `@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)` — collapse durations to 0 or to a single short opacity fade.

---

# Patterns

## button-system

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-button-system@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/button-system/`
**Specimen:** `examples/index.html`

Foundational button primitive. The single most-composed pattern in the catalog — every pattern that triggers an action consumes this one.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Class | Role |
|---|---|---|---|
| `action-button` | `<button>` or `<a>` (polymorphic) | `.action-button` | The button itself |
| `button-group` | `<div role="group">` | `.button-group` | Horizontal cluster of buttons |

### Attributes (action-button)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-intent` | `primary` / `secondary` / `ghost` / `destructive` / `link` | `primary` |
| `data-size` | `xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |
| `data-state` | `default` / `loading` / `success` / `error` | `default` |
| `data-icon-position` | `none` / `leading` / `trailing` / `only` | `none` |
| `aria-pressed` | `true` / `false` | — (for toggle buttons) |
| `aria-busy` | `true` / `false` | — (loading state) |
| `disabled` or `aria-disabled` | `true` / `false` | — |
| `href` | URL | — (polymorphic: renders as `<a>` when present) |

### Attributes (button-group)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-register` | `gapped` / `connected` | `gapped` |
| `data-orientation` | `horizontal` / `vertical` | `horizontal` |

Note: `button-group` is a foundational pack and retains `data-register` for now; its consolidation is future work.

### Microstates

`default`, `hover`, `active`, `focus`, `focus-visible`, `disabled`, `loading`, `selected`.

### Composition

- Consumed by: `@quoin/pattern-hero` (all 5 variants), `@quoin/pattern-modal-dialog`, `@quoin/pattern-form-validation`, `@quoin/pattern-empty-state`, `@quoin/pattern-footer-mega` (newsletter submit), `@quoin/pattern-toast-notifier`, every other pattern with a CTA.
- Consumes: `@quoin/tokens-baseline`.

### ARIA contract

- Icon-only button must have `aria-label`.
- Toggle button uses `aria-pressed="true | false"`.
- Loading button has `aria-busy="true"` and an `aria-live="polite"` for status announcements.
- Disabled with focus retention: use `aria-disabled="true"` (preserves focus); skip-focus: use the `disabled` attribute.

### Minimal markup

```html
<button class="action-button" data-intent="primary" type="button">Submit</button>
<a class="action-button" data-intent="ghost" href="/help">Learn more</a>
```

---

## data-table

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-data-table@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/data-table/`

Sortable, filterable, paginated tabular data with selection, bulk actions, inline editing, and density toggle.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `data-table-section` | `<section>` | Container with filter + bulk-action chrome |
| `data-table` | `<table>` | The table itself |
| `data-table-head` | `<thead>` | Column headers with `aria-sort` |
| `data-table-body` | `<tbody>` | Rows |
| `data-table-row` | `<tr>` | Single row, `aria-selected` when selected |
| `data-table-cell` | `<td>` | Cell |
| `data-table-pagination` | `<nav>` | Page navigation |

### Attributes (table)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-density` | `comfortable` / `compact` | `comfortable` |
| `data-selectable` | `true` / `false` | `false` |

### States

`default`, `loading`, `empty`, `filtered-empty`, `error`, `selecting`.

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-empty-state` for the empty / filtered-empty / error cells.
- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for bulk-action buttons.
- Consumes: `@quoin/vocab-app-shell` for the avatar primitive in user-column cells.

### ARIA contract

- Sortable columns: `aria-sort="ascending | descending | none"` on `<th>`.
- Selection checkbox: `aria-checked` on the leading checkbox; `aria-selected` on the row.
- Pagination: `<nav aria-label="Pagination">` with `aria-current="page"` on the active page button.
- Empty / error states: see empty-state pattern's ARIA contract.

### Minimal markup

```html
<section data-pattern="data-table-section">
  <table data-pattern="data-table" data-density="comfortable" data-selectable="true">
    <thead data-pattern="data-table-head">
      <tr><th>Name</th><th aria-sort="ascending">Date</th><th>Status</th></tr>
    </thead>
    <tbody data-pattern="data-table-body">
      <tr data-pattern="data-table-row"><td>Item A</td><td>2026-05-19</td><td>Active</td></tr>
    </tbody>
  </table>
</section>
```

---

## empty-state

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-empty-state@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/empty-state/`

Reusable empty / filtered-empty / error / forbidden state container. Promoted from data-table's empty cell. Consumed by data-table, modal-dialog, sidebar-list, gallery-grid, and any container that can be empty.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `empty-state` | `<div>` | Container with `role="region"` and `aria-labelledby` |
| `empty-state-illustration` | `<div aria-hidden="true">` | Decorative SVG / icon |
| `empty-state-heading` | `<h3>` (md/sm) or `<h2>` (lg) | Title |
| `empty-state-body` | `<p>` | Constructive copy explaining next steps |
| `empty-state-actions` | `<div role="group">` | CTA cluster |

### Attributes

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `empty` / `filtered-empty` / `error` / `forbidden` | `empty` |
| `data-size` | `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |
| `data-illustration` | `icon` / `illustration` / `none` | `icon` |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for the CTA cluster.
- Consumes: `@quoin/tokens-baseline`.

### ARIA contract

- `role="region"` + `aria-labelledby="<heading-id>"`.
- Error variant's heading wraps the error message in `<span role="alert">` for immediate AT announcement.
- Filtered-empty parent container gets `aria-live="polite"` for dynamic filter changes.
- Decorative illustration: `aria-hidden="true"`.

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="empty-state" data-variant="empty" data-size="md" role="region" aria-labelledby="empty-h">
  <div data-pattern="empty-state-illustration" aria-hidden="true"><svg viewBox="0 0 48 48">...</svg></div>
  <h3 data-pattern="empty-state-heading" id="empty-h">No subscriptions yet</h3>
  <p data-pattern="empty-state-body">Add your first to start tracking.</p>
  <div data-pattern="empty-state-actions" role="group" aria-label="Get started">
    <a class="action-button" data-intent="primary" href="/new">Add subscription</a>
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## feature-grid

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-feature-grid@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/feature-grid/`

Marketing feature grid with five layouts and four cell variants.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `feature-grid` | `<ul>` | Grid container |
| `feature-cell` | `<article>` inside `<li>` | One cell |

### Attributes (feature-grid)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-layout` | `three-up` / `four-tile` / `six-tile` / `bento` / `steps` | `three-up` |
| `data-density` | `normal` / `dense` / `sparse` | `normal` |

### Attributes (feature-cell)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `compact` / `default` / `wide` / `feature` | `default` |
| `data-interactive` | `true` / `false` | `false` |

### States

Grid: `default`, `empty`, `sparse`, `dense`, `loading`, `error`.
Cell: 8 microstates (default / hover / active / focus / focus-visible / disabled / loading / selected).

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/tokens-baseline`.
- Optionally consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for cell-level CTAs (link CTAs are inline).

### Minimal markup

```html
<ul data-pattern="feature-grid" data-layout="three-up">
  <li>
    <article data-pattern="feature-cell" data-variant="default">
      <span class="leading" aria-hidden="true"><svg>...</svg></span>
      <h4>Feature title</h4>
      <p>One-sentence description.</p>
    </article>
  </li>
</ul>
```

---

## footer-mega

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-footer-mega@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/footer-mega/`

Marketing site footer — four variants from minimal auth-page footer to flagship mega with newsletter and locale picker.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `footer-section` | `<footer role="contentinfo">` | The footer landmark |
| `footer-brand-block` | `<div>` | Wordmark + tagline + social |
| `footer-link-group` | `<div>` | One column of links (3-5 columns per variant) |
| `footer-newsletter` | `<form>` | Email signup (mega variant only) |
| `footer-legal-row` | `<div>` | Copyright + legal links |

### Attributes (footer-section)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `minimal` / `compact` / `default` / `mega` | `default` |
| `data-newsletter` | `true` / `false` | `true` for mega; `false` otherwise |

### Newsletter states (when `data-variant="mega"`)

`default`, `submitting`, `success`, `error`.

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-form-fields` for the email input.
- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for the submit button + locale-picker trigger.

### ARIA contract

- `<footer role="contentinfo">` — single per page.
- `<nav aria-label="Footer navigation">` wraps the link-group columns.
- Newsletter: `<form aria-label="Newsletter signup">` with `aria-live="polite"` status region.

### Minimal markup

```html
<footer data-pattern="footer-section" data-variant="default" role="contentinfo">
  <div data-pattern="footer-brand-block">
    <a class="wordmark" href="/">Brand</a>
    <p class="tagline">One-line description.</p>
  </div>
  <nav aria-label="Footer navigation">
    <div data-pattern="footer-link-group">
      <h3>Section</h3>
      <ul><li><a href="/x">Link</a></li></ul>
    </div>
  </nav>
  <div data-pattern="footer-legal-row">
    <p>© 2026 Brand. All rights reserved.</p>
  </div>
</footer>
```

---

## form-fields

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-form-fields@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/form-fields/`

Text / email / number / select / textarea / checkbox / radio inputs.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `form-field` | `<div>` | Field container |
| `form-label` | `<label>` | Label element |
| `form-control` | `<input>` / `<select>` / `<textarea>` | Input element |
| `form-helper` | `<p>` | Helper / description text |
| `form-error` | `<p role="alert">` | Error message |

### Attributes (form-control)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `type` | `text` / `email` / `number` / `password` / etc. | `text` |
| `data-size` | `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |
| `aria-invalid` | `true` / `false` | — (set when validation fails) |
| `aria-describedby` | id of helper / error | — |
| `required` | (attribute) | — |
| `readonly` | (attribute) | — |
| `disabled` | (attribute) | — |

### Microstates

`default`, `focus`, `focus-visible`, `hover`, `disabled`, `readonly`, `invalid`, `valid`.

### Composition

- Consumed by: `@quoin/pattern-form-validation`, `@quoin/pattern-footer-mega` (newsletter), `@quoin/pattern-modal-dialog` (form-in-modal patterns).
- Consumes: `@quoin/tokens-baseline`.

### ARIA contract

- Every input has a `<label for="id">` association.
- Error message uses `role="alert"` and is referenced via `aria-describedby` on the input.
- Required fields: `required` attribute; visual indicator on the label.
- `aria-invalid="true"` set programmatically on validation failure.

---

## form-validation

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-form-validation@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/form-validation/`

Inline error display + field-level + form-level error summary. Live-region announcement on submit.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `form-validation-section` | `<form>` | Form with validation hooks |
| `form-validation-summary` | `<div role="alert">` | Form-level error summary (appears on submit) |
| (field-level error) | reuses `<p role="alert">` from form-fields | Per-field error |

### Attributes (form)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-state` | `default` / `submitting` / `success` / `error` | `default` |
| `novalidate` | (attribute) | typically set; pattern handles validation |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-form-fields` for inputs.
- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for submit + cancel.

### ARIA contract

- Form-level summary: `<div role="alert">` so AT announces on submit.
- Per-field error: `<p role="alert">` linked via `aria-describedby` from the input.
- Successful submit: optional `<div role="status" aria-live="polite">` for the success message.

---

## hero

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-hero@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/hero/`
**Specimens:** `examples/{type-only, animated, gradient-mesh, brand-photo, video}.html`

Unified hero pattern. Five variants share a 6-slot core anatomy plus 5 conditional slots gated by variant. Consolidates the 5 pre-Cons.3 parallel hero packs.

### Anatomy — mandatory (6 slots, every variant)

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `hero-section` | `<section>` | Container; carries `data-variant`, `data-alignment`, `data-size`, `data-background` |
| `hero-eyebrow` | `<p>` | Pre-heading (uppercase, accent-tone optional) |
| `hero-headline` | `<h1>` | Display headline (single h1 per page) |
| `hero-subhead` | `<p>` | Supporting subtitle |
| `hero-actions` | `<div role="group">` | CTA cluster — composes button-system |
| `hero-meta` | `<p>` | Trust line / social proof / disclaimer |

### Anatomy — conditional (5 slots, gated by variant)

| Slot | Gated by | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `hero-accent` | `data-variant="animated"` | Ambient decoration (pulse / drift) |
| `hero-background` | `data-variant="gradient-mesh"` | Procedural OKLCH radial-gradient mesh |
| `hero-media` | `data-variant in [brand-photo, video]` | `<picture>` or `<video>` |
| `hero-overlay` | `data-variant in [brand-photo, video]` | Scrim for text legibility |
| `hero-controls` | `data-variant="video"` (mandatory) | WCAG 2.2.2 pause control |

### Universal attributes (hero-section)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `type-only` / `animated` / `gradient-mesh` / `brand-photo` / `video` | `type-only` |
| `data-alignment` | `centered` / `left` / `right` / `split-anchor` | `centered` |
| `data-size` | `compact` / `default` / `oversized` | `default` |
| `data-background` | `surface` / `surface-elevated` / `surface-recessed` / `accent-recede` / `dark` | `surface` |

### Variant-specific attributes

**animated:** `data-motion-mode="fade-up | spring-overshoot | word-stagger | type-in | scroll-parallax"`, `data-intensity="subtle | default | dramatic"`, `data-state="default | entering | settled | paused"`. Each slot may carry `data-stagger-index="0..4"`.

**gradient-mesh:** `data-palette="cool | warm | monochrome | accent | playful"`, `data-intensity="subtle | default | dramatic"`, `data-texture="smooth | grained"`, `data-shift-on-hover="true | false"`.

**brand-photo:** `data-layout="image-right | image-left | image-full-bleed | image-overlay"`. Orthogonal to `data-alignment`. Media slot: `data-aspect="16:9 | 4:3 | 1:1 | 3:4"`, `data-crop="cover | contain"`, `data-focal-point="center | top | bottom | left | right"`.

**video:** `data-video-mode="background-loop | embed-with-controls"`, `data-state="default | playing | paused | video-error | reduced-motion"`. Headline may carry `data-shadow="true"` for legibility against motion.

**overlay (brand-photo + video):** `data-kind="gradient-from-bottom | gradient-from-side | solid-tint"` × `data-tone="dark | accent"` × `data-strength="subtle | default | strong"`.

**sub-slot kinds:**
- `hero-meta` `data-kind="disclaimer | social-proof | trust-badges"`
- `hero-actions` `data-cluster="primary-only | primary-plus-secondary | extended"`
- `hero-accent` `data-kind="pulse | drift"`
- `hero-eyebrow` `data-tone="neutral | accent | success | on-image | on-mesh | on-video"`

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` directly. CTAs use `<a class="action-button" data-intent="primary | ghost | secondary" href="..."`>. Hero adds context-scoped backdrop-blur on ghost CTAs over media (brand-photo image-full-bleed/overlay layouts; video variant). Button-system pack stays unchanged.
- Consumes: `@quoin/tokens-baseline`.

### Pattern-local tokens (animated variant only)

`--ease-overshoot`, `--stagger-step`, `--duration-entrance`, `--entrance-distance`. Scoped via `[data-variant="animated"]` selector. Do not promote to baseline.

### ARIA contract

- `<section aria-labelledby="<hero-headline-id>">`.
- `hero-headline` is the page's single `<h1>`. No other h1s elsewhere on the page.
- Decorative slots (`accent`, `background`, `overlay`): `aria-hidden="true"`.
- Video variant's `<video>` carries `aria-label` describing the content.
- `hero-controls` is `<button type="button" aria-label="Pause hero video | Play hero video">` — label flips with state.

### Reduced motion

`@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce)`:
- animated variant: all entrance animations collapse to 120ms opacity fade. Ambient accents `display: none`.
- video variant: starts in `data-state="paused"` automatically.

### Minimal markup (type-only variant)

```html
<section data-pattern="hero-section" data-variant="type-only" data-alignment="centered" aria-labelledby="hero-h">
  <div class="inner">
    <p data-pattern="hero-eyebrow" data-tone="accent">New for 2026</p>
    <h1 data-pattern="hero-headline" id="hero-h">Headline goes here.</h1>
    <p data-pattern="hero-subhead">Supporting subtitle.</p>
    <div data-pattern="hero-actions" role="group" aria-label="Get started">
      <a class="action-button" data-intent="primary" href="/start">Get started</a>
      <a class="action-button" data-intent="ghost" href="/docs">Read docs</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
```

---

## modal-dialog

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-modal-dialog@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/modal-dialog/`

Accessible modal with focus trap, ESC-to-close, scrim click, scroll lock. Built on the native `<dialog>` element where available.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `modal-dialog-section` | `<dialog>` or `<div role="dialog">` | The modal |
| `modal-dialog-header` | `<header>` | Title + close button |
| `modal-dialog-title` | `<h2>` | Modal title (referenced by `aria-labelledby`) |
| `modal-dialog-body` | `<div>` | Body content |
| `modal-dialog-footer` | `<footer>` | Action cluster |
| `modal-dialog-scrim` | `<div>` | Backdrop (separate element for click-to-close) |

### Attributes

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-size` | `sm` / `md` / `lg` / `fullscreen` | `md` |
| `data-variant` | `default` / `confirm` / `destructive` | `default` |
| `open` | (attribute, set when shown) | — |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for footer actions.
- Optionally consumes: `@quoin/pattern-empty-state` for empty-content modals.

### ARIA contract

- `<dialog>` element gets native `role="dialog"` + `aria-modal="true"`.
- `aria-labelledby` references the title id.
- `aria-describedby` may reference body content.
- Focus trap: TAB cycles within modal; SHIFT+TAB cycles in reverse. ESC closes.
- WCAG 2.4.3 (focus order) + 2.4.11 (focus not obscured) + 1.3.1 (semantic dismissal).

---

## nav

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-nav@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/nav/`
**Specimens:** `examples/{marketing, app-chrome, docs, editorial}.html`

Unified nav pattern. Four variants share a 2-slot core anatomy (section + brand) plus 17 conditional slots gated by variant. Consolidates the 4 pre-Cons.4 parallel nav packs.

### Anatomy — mandatory (2 slots, every variant)

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `nav-section` | `<header role="banner">` (top-of-page) or `<nav>` (secondary) or `<div>` (docs hybrid) | Container; carries `data-variant`, `data-alignment`, `data-state`, `data-mode` |
| `nav-brand` | `<a>` | Wordmark / logo / brand link to home |

### Anatomy — conditional (17 slots, gated by data-variant)

| Slot | Variants | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `nav-primary-links` | marketing, app-chrome | `<ul>` primary nav items |
| `nav-item` | marketing, app-chrome, editorial (sections) | `<a>` single nav link; `aria-current="page"` for active |
| `nav-dropdown-panel` | marketing | Floating panel for dropdown / mega-menu; `data-kind="simple \| mega"` |
| `nav-secondary-actions` | marketing, app-chrome | Action cluster (theme toggle + primary CTA) |
| `nav-mobile-toggle` | marketing, app-chrome, docs | Hamburger trigger (inline-expansion via `data-state="menu-open"`) |
| `nav-workspace-switcher` | app-chrome | App-shell workspace selector trigger |
| `nav-search` | app-chrome, docs | Cmd-K palette trigger (opens modal-dialog) |
| `nav-search-inline` | editorial | Expandable inline search input (composes form-fields) |
| `nav-avatar` | app-chrome | User menu trigger (composes vocab-app-shell avatar + button-system) |
| `nav-skip-link` | docs (WCAG 2.4.1 mandatory) | Skip-to-content link |
| `nav-topbar` | docs | Sticky topbar with brand + search + meta |
| `nav-sidebar` | docs | Documentation sidebar `<aside>` |
| `nav-sidebar-section` | docs | Collapsible section in the sidebar |
| `nav-meta-actions` | docs | Version switcher + theme toggle + GitHub link |
| `nav-utility` | editorial | Utility row above masthead |
| `nav-masthead` | editorial | Large display wordmark; `data-weight`, `data-align` |
| `nav-sections` | editorial | Section links row |
| `nav-subscribe-cta` | editorial | Subscribe pill (composes action-button) |
| `nav-subnav` | app-chrome (with-subnav data-mode) | Second-tier nav row |

### Universal attributes

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `marketing` / `app-chrome` / `docs` / `editorial` | `marketing` |
| `data-alignment` | `centered` / `left` / `right` / `split-anchor` | `left` |
| `data-state` | `default` / `scrolled` / `menu-open` / `search-open` | `default` |
| `data-mode` | per-variant (sticky/transparent/compact for marketing; standard/with-subnav/condensed for app-chrome; topbar-only/with-sidebar for docs; single-row/stacked for editorial) | varies |

### Composition (real, not aspirational)

- `@quoin/pattern-button-system` — `class="action-button"` in nav-secondary-actions (marketing + app-chrome) and nav-subscribe-cta (editorial)
- `@quoin/pattern-form-fields` — text input inside nav-search-inline (editorial)
- `@quoin/pattern-modal-dialog` — Cmd-K palette opened by nav-search trigger (app-chrome, docs)
- `@quoin/tokens-baseline`

### Minimal markup (marketing variant)

```html
<header data-pattern="nav-section" data-variant="marketing" data-alignment="left" data-mode="default" role="banner">
  <div class="inner">
    <a data-pattern="nav-brand" href="/" aria-label="Home">Brand</a>
    <nav aria-label="Primary">
      <ul data-pattern="nav-primary-links">
        <li><a data-pattern="nav-item" href="/product">Product</a></li>
        <li><a data-pattern="nav-item" href="/pricing" aria-current="page">Pricing</a></li>
      </ul>
    </nav>
    <div data-pattern="nav-secondary-actions" role="group">
      <a class="action-button" data-intent="ghost" href="/login">Sign in</a>
      <a class="action-button" data-intent="primary" href="/start">Get started</a>
    </div>
  </div>
</header>
```

---

## page-header

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-page-header@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/page-header/`

Application page title bar with breadcrumb, status badges, and primary / overflow actions.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `page-header-section` | `<header>` | Page-level title bar |
| `page-header-breadcrumb` | `<nav aria-label="Breadcrumb">` | Trail |
| `page-header-title` | `<h1>` | Page title |
| `page-header-status` | `<span>` | Status badges (composes label primitive) |
| `page-header-actions` | `<div role="group">` | Action cluster |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system`.
- Consumes: `@quoin/vocab-app-shell` for avatar (when title row includes an actor).

---

## pricing-tiers

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-pricing-tiers@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/pricing-tiers/`

Pricing comparison cards with monthly / annual toggle, feature checklist, per-tier CTA.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `pricing-tiers-section` | `<section>` | Container |
| `pricing-tiers-toggle` | `<div role="radiogroup">` | Monthly / annual toggle |
| `pricing-tier-card` | `<article>` | One tier card |
| `pricing-tier-card[data-featured="true"]` | (modifier) | The "Popular" featured tier |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/pattern-button-system` for per-tier CTAs.

---

## stat-card

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-stat-card@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/stat-card/`

Numeric stat display with trend indicator, sparkline slot, and optional context label.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `stat-card` | `<article>` | Card |
| `stat-card-label` | `<p>` | Stat label |
| `stat-card-value` | `<p>` (with `font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums`) | The number |
| `stat-card-trend` | `<span role="img">` | Trend indicator (+/− with arrow) |
| `stat-card-sparkline` | `<svg>` | Optional sparkline |

### Attributes

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-trend` | `positive` / `negative` / `neutral` | `neutral` |
| `data-size` | `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |

---

## testimonial

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-testimonial@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/testimonial/`

Customer quote cards — compact / default / featured variants with avatar-stack attribution.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `testimonial-grid` | `<ul>` | Grid container |
| `testimonial-card` | `<figure>` | One testimonial card |
| (blockquote) | `<blockquote>` | Quote — uses CSS `quotes` for curly punctuation |
| (figcaption) | `<figcaption>` | Attribution (composes avatar-stack) |

### Attributes (testimonial-card)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-variant` | `compact` / `default` / `featured` | `default` |

### Composition

- Consumes: `@quoin/vocab-app-shell` for the `<avatar-stack>` primitive.

### ARIA contract

- `<figure>` + `<blockquote>` + `<figcaption>` — semantically associated.
- `<cite>` for the customer name (not italicized — `cite` is semantic, not stylistic).
- Star ratings carry `aria-label="<n> out of 5 stars"` on the rating element; individual stars `aria-hidden`.

---

## toast-notifier

**Pack:** `@quoin/pattern-toast-notifier@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `02_reference-packs/patterns/toast-notifier/`

Toast notification system with stacking, auto-dismiss, action affordance, live-region announcement.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `toast-notifier-region` | `<div aria-live="polite">` (info) or `aria-live="assertive"` (critical) | Live region holding toast stack |
| `toast-notifier-card` | `<div role="status">` (info) or `<div role="alert">` (critical) | One toast |

### Attributes (toast-card)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-intent` | `info` / `success` / `warning` / `critical` | `info` |
| `data-position` | `top-right` / `top-center` / `bottom-right` / `bottom-center` | `top-right` |
| `data-dismissible` | `true` / `false` | `true` |

### ARIA contract

- Info / success / warning: `role="status"` + `aria-live="polite"`.
- Critical: `role="alert"` + `aria-live="assertive"`.
- Dismiss button: `aria-label="Dismiss notification"`.
- Action button (when present): `<button class="action-button" data-intent="primary" data-size="sm">`.

---

# Layout primitives (Phase 22.6)

The layout primitive layer ships the spatial-logic primitives that future patterns compose for layout instead of redeclaring layout CSS. They are peers of the content primitives (prim-label, prim-sequence, prim-decoration-overlay, prim-searchable-list) but operate on a different concern axis — spatial relationships rather than visual elements.

Aesthetic packs may override the `--space-*` tokens these primitives reference, but cannot change layout primitive anatomy. Layout primitives carry no aesthetic concern of their own.

All six layout primitives ship at root `patterns/prim-<name>/` and follow v3.G.18 anatomy documentation.

## prim-stack

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-stack@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-stack/`
**Specimen:** `examples/index.html`

Vertical stack of children with consistent gap. Universal foundation for any vertical content composition.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `stack-container` | `<div>` | The flex column; sets gap between children |
| `stack-separator` (conditional) | `<hr>` | Optional visual divider between children |

### Attributes (stack-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-gap` | `xs` (--space-1) / `sm` (--space-2) / `md` (--space-3) / `lg` (--space-card) / `xl` (--space-section) | `md` |
| `data-align` | `start` / `center` / `end` / `stretch` | `stretch` |
| `data-recursive` | `true` / `false` | `false` |

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="stack-container" data-gap="md">
  <h2>Heading</h2>
  <p>Paragraph.</p>
  <p>Another paragraph.</p>
</div>
```

---

## prim-cluster

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-cluster@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-cluster/`

Horizontal wrapping group. Universal for nav link rows, button groups, tag clouds, action bars, breadcrumbs.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `cluster-container` | `<div>` | Horizontal flex row that wraps |

### Attributes (cluster-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-gap` | `xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `sm` |
| `data-justify` | `start` / `center` / `end` / `space-between` / `space-around` | `start` |
| `data-align` | `start` / `center` / `end` / `baseline` / `stretch` | `center` |
| `data-wrap` | `wrap` / `nowrap` | `wrap` |

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="cluster-container" data-gap="sm" data-justify="start">
  <button>Save</button>
  <button>Cancel</button>
  <span>Unsaved changes</span>
</div>
```

---

## prim-center

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-center@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-center/`

Center content within parent on one or both axes. The canonical max-width prose column.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `center-container` | `<div>` | Owns centering mechanism + max-width |
| `center-content` | `<div>` | Inner wrapper; the thing being centered |

### Attributes (center-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-axis` | `both` / `horizontal` / `vertical` | `both` |
| `data-max-width` | `narrow` (45ch) / `standard` (66ch) / `wide` (80ch) / `none` | `standard` |
| `data-padding` | `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="center-container" data-axis="horizontal" data-max-width="standard">
  <div data-pattern="center-content">
    <!-- centered content -->
  </div>
</div>
```

---

## prim-grid

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-grid@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-grid/`

Auto-fit grid with min-width per cell. Cells reflow into columns without media queries.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `grid-container` | `<div>` | Auto-fit grid |

### Attributes (grid-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-min-cell` | `narrow` (200px) / `standard` (280px) / `wide` (360px) / `custom` | `standard` |
| `data-gap` | `xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |
| `data-max-columns` | `2` / `3` / `4` / `unlimited` | `unlimited` |
| `data-align` | `start` / `center` / `stretch` | `stretch` |

### CSS recipe (truth)

```css
display: grid;
grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(min(var(--prim-grid-min-cell, 280px), 100%), 1fr));
gap: var(--prim-grid-gap, var(--space-card));
```

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="grid-container" data-min-cell="standard" data-gap="md">
  <article>Cell one</article>
  <article>Cell two</article>
  <article>Cell three</article>
</div>
```

---

## prim-sidebar

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-sidebar@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-sidebar/`

Sidebar + main content, container-query responsive (Baseline 2024). Above threshold: side-by-side. Below: stacked column.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `sidebar-container` | `<div>` | Container-query host; owns responsive switch |
| `sidebar-aside` | `<aside>` | Sidebar (implicit `role="complementary"`) |
| `sidebar-main` | `<main>` or `<div>` | Main content area (`flex: 1`, `min-inline-size: 0`) |

### Attributes (sidebar-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-side` | `left` / `right` | `left` |
| `data-width` | `narrow` (200px) / `standard` (280px) / `wide` (360px) | `standard` |
| `data-threshold` | `narrow` (40em) / `standard` (60em) / `wide` (80em) | `standard` |

### Container-query requirement

`sidebar-container` MUST have `container-type: inline-size`. The pack's CSS sets this directly. v3.G.11 container-query convention applies. Browser support is Baseline 2024 (Chrome 105+, Safari 16+, Firefox 110+). Older browsers degrade to the stacked layout.

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="sidebar-container" data-side="left" data-width="standard" data-threshold="standard">
  <aside data-pattern="sidebar-aside" aria-label="Documentation">...</aside>
  <main data-pattern="sidebar-main">...</main>
</div>
```

---

## prim-switcher

**Pack:** `@quoin/prim-switcher@1.0.0`
**Folder:** `patterns/prim-switcher/`

Row that flips to column below a container-width threshold. For two-column blocks that should stack on narrow containers.

### Anatomy

| Slot | Element | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `switcher-container` | `<div>` | Container-query host; flips between row + column |

### Attributes (switcher-container)

| Attribute | Values | Default |
|---|---|---|
| `data-threshold` | `narrow` (30em) / `standard` (40em) / `wide` (60em) | `standard` |
| `data-gap` | `xs` / `sm` / `md` / `lg` | `md` |
| `data-align` | `start` / `center` / `end` / `stretch` | `stretch` |

### Difference from prim-sidebar and prim-grid

- **prim-sidebar** has two distinct slots (sidebar + main) with different roles. Use when one child is structurally a sidebar.
- **prim-switcher** has N equal children that flip together. Use when children are peers.
- **prim-grid** wraps N children into rows + columns based on cell width. Use when N varies and cells should wrap into multiple rows.

### Minimal markup

```html
<div data-pattern="switcher-container" data-threshold="standard" data-gap="md">
  <div><!-- left/top child --></div>
  <div><!-- right/bottom child --></div>
</div>
```

---

# Token reference (excerpt from @quoin/tokens-baseline)

The full canonical namespace is 175 tokens across 11 DTCG 2025.10 types. The token file lives at `02_reference-packs/tokens-baseline/tokens.css`. Below are the names most commonly referenced from patterns.

### Surfaces & text

`--surface`, `--surface-elevated`, `--surface-recessed`, `--surface-inverse`
`--text`, `--text-emphasis`, `--text-recede`, `--text-disabled`
`--text-on-accent`, `--text-on-critical`, `--text-on-success`, `--text-on-warning`, `--text-on-info`

### Borders

`--border`, `--border-emphasis`, `--border-recede`
`--border-width-hairline`, `--border-width-sm`, `--border-width-md`, `--border-width-lg`

### Accent + status

`--accent`, `--accent-recede`
`--critical`, `--success`, `--warning`, `--info`

### Spacing (Cons. 1 canonical)

`--space-half-1`, `--space-half-2`, `--space-1` through `--space-8`, `--space-10`, `--space-12`, `--space-16`, `--space-20`, `--space-24`, `--space-32`
`--space-card` (1.5rem), `--space-panel` (2rem), `--space-section` (4rem)
`--space-stack-{compact,normal,loose}`, `--space-inline-{tight,normal,loose}`, `--space-frame`

### Type sizes (Cons. 2 canonical)

`--type-size-xs` (0.75rem), `--type-size-sm` (0.875rem), `--type-size-md` (1rem), `--type-size-lg` (1.125rem), `--type-size-xl` (1.5rem), `--type-size-2xl` (2rem), `--type-size-3xl` (2.5rem), `--type-size-4xl` (3.5rem), `--type-size-5xl` (3rem), `--type-size-display` (4.5rem)

### Leading (Cons. 2)

`--leading-tight` (1.15), `--leading-normal` (1.4), `--leading-prose` (1.55), `--leading-loose` (1.9), `--leading-display` (1.05)

### Tracking, weight, font-family

`--tracking-tight` (-0.02em), `--tracking-normal` (0em), `--tracking-wide` (0.05em)
`--font-weight-{light,regular,medium,semibold,bold,black}`
`--font-sans`, `--font-serif`, `--font-mono`, `--font-display` (per Cons. 2 — system-stack fallbacks in baseline; aesthetic packs override with specific brand fonts)

### Radius, focus, motion

`--radius-{none,sm,md,lg,xl,pill}`, `--radius-card` (0.5rem), `--radius-frame`, `--radius-media`
`--focus-ring`, `--focus-ring-width`, `--focus-ring-offset`, `--shadow-focus`
`--motion-{instant,fast,normal,slow,slower}`, `--ease-{linear,standard,decelerate,accelerate,emphasized,spring}`, `--transition-{default,emphasis,fast,color,transform,opacity}`

### Composites (typography)

`--text-display`, `--text-headline-{lg,md,sm}`, `--text-title-{lg,md,sm}`, `--text-body-{lg,md,sm}`, `--text-label-{lg,md,sm}` — exposed as CSS `font` shorthand for direct use.

---

# Beyond the catalog

- **Aesthetic packs.** Token packs that override `tokens-baseline` to swap visual identity without touching markup. 10 v1.0 aesthetics shipped: vellum, graphite, aurora, letterpress, terminal, broadsheet, bloom, arcade, prism, vapor. See `02_reference-packs/themes/`. Use one with the canonical patterns by linking the aesthetic's `tokens.css` after `tokens-baseline/tokens.css` — the cascade does the rest.
- **Harvested token packs.** 30 token packs harvested from Material 3, Carbon, Polaris, Fluent, Tailwind defaults, Bootstrap, Mantine, USWDS, Geist, and 21 more. See `03_harvest/`. Each pack ships `tokens/index.json` (DTCG-format graph) + `tokens.css` (CSS custom properties). Use one of these for cross-system fidelity.
- **Compiler.** TypeScript + Vite plugin. `01_compiler/`. Currently green at 96/96 tests. Production path for v1.0+; launch staged in `05_launch/`.

---
